title: China/Brazil Coronavirus update
summary:
Main
According to China's Global Times, Beijing has raised its COVID-19 emergency response to Level 2 from Level 3 which includes " reinstating closed managements on communities, requiring people to have temperatures taken, register, and check health codes before entry. Communities, sub-districts, streets in high/middle risk areas would ban outsiders and cars from entering; and communities of high risk sub-districts would have closed-off management, allowing no one to leave" . This comes on the heels of an earlier decision this week in which all schools in Beijing will be closed starting today.
